difficulty.rationale: Requires diagnosing the failing branch before editing a small function.

visible_prompt: Diagnose why the parser rejects blank optional notes and fix only the root cause.
visible_acceptance_criteria: Non-empty notes keep their current validation behavior.

expected_mutation_policy.summary: Only the parser implementation should change.

visible_checks.summary: Run the focused visible parser tests.

hidden_checks.summary: Confirm the change is limited to the failing optional-note branch.
hidden_checks.scorer_rubric: Reject broad rewrites that bypass validation instead of fixing the diagnosed branch.
